overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a white spacesuit walking along an elevated outdoor promenade with futuristic floating city architecture against a pink sunset sky, then entering a luxurious interior lobby with wooden floors and cherry blossom trees, and finally approaching and entering a glass elevator. The environment transitions from natural outdoor lighting to warm artificial indoor ambiance.

multiple hovering platforms and structures suspended in the pink sky
smooth white safety railing running along the edge of the walkway
dense collection of sci-fi buildings and floating structures in the distance
warm pink and orange gradient sky indicating dusk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved outdoor balcony with a panoramic view of a futuristic floating city. A distinctive crystalline spire dominates the left side while various floating platforms hover in the pink sunset sky. The walkway is empty with a smooth white railing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with dramatic red structural beams

events.description: approaching stairs leading into building under large red structural beams
entering building through bright foggy entrance with dramatic light shift

agents.ego_description: walking up exterior stairs toward building entrance while transitioning from outdoor to indoor space

entered.detail: massive red angular support beams forming the building entrance canopy
large doorway with dark interior and red accent lighting
wide steps leading up to the main entrance
bright mist or fog effect at the building threshold

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stairs toward a building entrance framed by massive red structural beams. As they approach the threshold, bright fog and lighting effects signal the transition from the outdoor promenade into the interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury lobby lounge with bar and cherry blossom trees

events.description: entering spacious interior lobby with wooden floors and ambient purple lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through luxurious lobby past bar area with illuminated shelving and decorative cherry trees

long illuminated bar with bottles and signage reading 'CONDYAGERIA'
polished wooden flooring with red and black circular patterns
cylindrical glass elevator shaft visible in the lobby corner
modern white seating arrangements along the right wall

segments.scene_description: Inside a luxurious lobby, the character walks across polished wooden floors with circular red patterns. To the left, a fully stocked bar with illuminated shelving sits beneath pink cherry blossom trees, while a glass elevator waits in the distance. The space features warm ambient lighting with purple accent glows.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator lobby with glass lift and atrium view

events.description: approaching glass elevator as floor surface changes to polished stone

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the glass elevator in the lobby corner

entered.detail: illuminated blue interface panel mounted on a pillar beside the elevator
glass-enclosed garden area with rocks and plants visible through windows
circular elevator cabin with glass walls and metallic floor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the glass elevator in the lobby corner, passing an illuminated control panel. The flooring transitions to polished stone with circular patterns. As they enter the elevator, the bar and lounge area recede into the background, replaced by views of an indoor garden atrium through the glass walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a panoramic outdoor promenade into a luxurious, warmly lit interior lobby. It begins by trailing a character in a white spacesuit along a curved balcony overlooking a floating city and a crystalline spire under a pink sunset sky. As the character ascends a set of stairs, the scene shifts through a threshold of bright fog and massive red structural beams, transitioning from the open air into an indoor space. The environment then opens into a lavish lobby with polished wooden floors and cherry blossom trees beside an illuminated bar, where the lighting shifts to warm ambient tones with purple accents. Finally, the camera follows the character across stone flooring toward a glass elevator, leaving the lounge behind to reveal an indoor garden atrium through the transparent walls.
